name: Outbrain Native Advertising API
what_it_does: Native advertising and content discovery platform with REST API — enabling publishers and advertisers to distribute sponsored content as recommended articles across a premium publisher network, with campaign management, audience targeting, conversion tracking, and performance reporting.
use_cases: Programmatically managing native advertising campaigns across Outbrain publisher network
Querying campaign performance metrics for automated bidding and budget optimization
Syncing campaign creative and audience targeting from internal systems via API
Building custom reporting dashboards from Outbrain performance data
Automating campaign pause/resume based on ROAS or conversion thresholds
not_for: Brand awareness without click/engagement goals (Outbrain is performance-focused)
B2B account-based marketing (Outbrain is B2C content discovery)
Social media advertising (use Meta or LinkedIn Ads for social)
best_when: A digital media company or performance marketer wants to distribute content articles as native ads on premium publisher sites (CNN, MSN, etc.) with CPC or CPA bidding.
avoid_when: You need brand display advertising, video pre-roll, or B2B account targeting rather than content-native recommendation placements.

auth.notes: OAuth2 with client credentials flow for server-to-server. Access token obtained via /oauth/token endpoint. Account ID required in all requests. Token expiry requires refresh. No webhooks — polling for reporting data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Minimum spend thresholds; $100 minimum campaign budget
pricing.paid_tiers: CPC bidding starting $0.03/click; minimum budget requirements per campaign
pricing.notes: New York-based. Founded 2006. Raised $200M+. 7,000+ premium publisher partners (CNN, MSN, Washington Post). Merged with Teads to form Outbrain in 2024. Amplitude platform for advertisers. CPC and CPA bidding models. Strong in news and editorial content distribution.

performance.rate_limits: OAuth2 rate limits; reporting API throttled

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API (Amplify API) for campaigns, promotions, sections, and reports. OAuth2 client credentials. Good documentation via Apiary. No webhooks — use polling for report data. Reporting data has 3-hour delay for attribution. Account marketer ID required for all API calls.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Campaign reads idempotent. Performance reports idempotent by date range. Campaign creation may create duplicates — verify before retry. Creative uploads idempotent by content hash.
known_agent_gotchas: Account marketer ID required in all requests — different from login credentials
Reporting data has 3-hour attribution delay — real-time data is incomplete
No webhooks — implement polling loop for campaign status and report completion
Content editorial review delays campaign launch (24-48 hours for new creatives)
Domain verification required before serving ads — submit sitemap to Outbrain

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR and CCPA compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 client credentials. Advertiser financial data handled securely. Third-party tracking pixels for conversion measurement — consent required. IAB standards compliance for ad serving.
